issues.description: Trigger should be 'StartOfTurn' not 'Activated' — this is a passive turn-start effect, not an activated ability
Condition missing: must check that only Celestial Dragons type Characters are on your field. Should include HasCardOnBoard condition or similar type-checking logic
Duration should be 'DuringYourTurn' not 'EndOfTurn' — '[Your Turn]' in card text indicates effect lasts during your turn only, not until end of turn
